title: 'Suspicious item' found at RAF Lossiemouth as site locked down by police

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: 'Suspicious item' found at RAF Lossiemouth as site locked down by police. A Scottish RAF base has been locked down after reports of the discovery of a suspicious package. Bomb squads raced to the base at RAF...
